items.title_en: Fed dissenters explain 'no' votes, saying they disagreed with hinting next move would be a cut
items.title_zh: 美联储持不同政见者解释了“反对”票，称他们不同意暗示下一步行动将是降息
items.desc_en: Federal Reserve officials who voted this week against the post-meeting statement said they didn't think it was appropriate to signal that the next interest rate move would be lower.
items.desc_zh: 本周对会后声明投反对票的美联储官员表示，他们认为暗示下一步利率将降低是不合适的。

items.title_en: Pentagon tech chief says Anthropic is still blacklisted, but Mythos is a separate issue
items.title_zh: 五角大楼技术负责人表示，Anthropic 仍被列入黑名单，但 Mythos 是一个单独的问题

items.title_en: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: Apple, Estee Lauder, Roku, Reddit, Roblox and more
items.title_zh: 盘前涨幅最大的股票：苹果、雅诗兰黛、Roku、Reddit、Roblox 等
items.desc_en: These are the stocks posting the largest moves premarket.
items.desc_zh: 这些是盘前涨幅最大的股票。

items.title_en: Estee Lauder plans to cut up to 3,000 more jobs, lifts annual profit forecast
items.title_zh: 雅诗兰黛计划再裁员3000人并上调年度利润预期
items.desc_en: Estee ​Lauder on Friday ​raised its annual profit forecast and laid out plans to cut up to 3,000 more jobs as it accelerates a broad restructuring plan.
items.desc_zh: 雅诗兰黛周五上调了年度利润预期，并制定了裁员 3,000 人的计划，以加快广泛的重组计划。

items.title_en: Elon Musk billionaires bill supporters draw progressive challengers in Delaware
items.title_zh: 埃隆·马斯克亿万富翁法案的支持者在特拉华州吸引了进步的挑战者
items.desc_en: Musk, whose record pay package was in legal limbo in Delaware, relocated Tesla's incorporation out of state during the spat.
items.desc_zh: 马斯克的创纪录薪酬在特拉华州陷入法律困境，在这场争执期间，他将特斯拉的公司迁出了该州。

items.title_en: Here's what major analysts are saying about Apple's earnings
items.title_zh: 以下是主要分析师对苹果盈利的看法
items.desc_en: Apple is expected to gain more ground after its earnings report showed the iPhone maker has largely weathered headwinds like rising memory costs, analysts said.
items.desc_zh: 分析师表示，苹果公司的盈利报告显示，iPhone 制造商基本上经受住了内存成本上涨等不利因素，预计该公司将获得更多进展。

items.title_en: Spotify adds 'Verified' badges to distinguish human artists from AI
items.title_zh: Spotify 添加“已验证”徽章以区分人类艺术家和人工智能
items.desc_en: The music streaming platform will review criteria such as artists' live dates and social media presence.
items.desc_zh: 该音乐流媒体平台将审查艺术家的现场日期和社交媒体存在等标准。

items.title_en: Berkshire shares struggle into annual meeting. Can Abel rekindle enthusiasm without Buffett center stage?
items.title_zh: 伯克希尔股票在年会上陷入困境。如果没有巴菲特的关注，阿贝尔能否重燃热情？
items.desc_en: For the first time, the 95-year-old Buffett won't be the central figure on stage, marking a new era for one of investing's most closely watched rituals.
items.desc_zh: 95 岁的巴菲特将首次不再成为舞台上的中心人物，这标志着最受关注的投资仪式之一进入了新时代。

items.desc_zh: 这位流行歌星的代表称这一事件“完全不可原谅”，此后她已经接受了康复治疗。

items.title_en: Inside the Fed: Powell vows he won't be a 'shadow chair,' but a Warsh clash will be tough to avoid
items.title_zh: 美联储内部：鲍威尔发誓他不会成为“影子主席”，但沃什的冲突将难以避免
items.desc_en: When the Fed gathers again, it will mark the first time a sitting and former chair conduct business together in nearly 80 years.
items.desc_zh: 当美联储再次召开会议时，这将标志着近 80 年来首次现任主席和前任主席一起处理事务。

items.title_en: Twitch streamer hit by car live on camera - 'It felt like slow motion'

items.desc_zh: 以赛亚·托马斯（Isaiah Thomas，又名 hmblzayy）在进行 3,000 英里挑战时被击中

items.title_en: Myanmar ex-leader Aung San Suu Kyi moved to house arrest, military says
items.title_zh: 缅甸前领导人昂山素季转为软禁，军方称
items.desc_en: The Nobel Peace Prize laureate has been in detention since she was ousted in a military coup in 2021.
items.desc_zh: 这位诺贝尔和平奖获得者自 2021 年在军事政变中被赶下台以来一直被拘留。

items.title_en: Trump expected to sign executive order expanding retirement account access for workers

items.desc_en: The president's executive order will expand retirement account access for workers and will be integrated with the Saver's Match.
items.desc_zh: 总统的行政命令将扩大工人退休账户的使用范围，并将与储蓄者匹配计划相结合。

items.desc_zh: Meta 及其分包商对于为何裁员 1000 多名肯尼亚工人存在分歧。

items.desc_en: Elon Musk was cross-examined on the third day of the trial over his lawsuit against Sam Altman and OpenAI.
items.desc_zh: 埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 在审判的第三天就他对萨姆·奥尔特曼 (Sam Altman) 和 OpenAI 的诉讼接受了盘问。

items.title_en: The friendlier the AI chatbot the more inaccurate it is, study suggests
items.title_zh: 研究表明，人工智能聊天机器人越友好，它就越不准确
items.desc_en: Researchers found adjusting AI systems to be more warm and friendly to users would result in an "accuracy trade-off".
items.desc_zh: 研究人员发现，将人工智能系统调整为对用户更加热情和友好会导致“准确性权衡”。

items.desc_zh: 关于 OpenAI 的历史和公开承诺的案例可能会对人工智能的未来产生重大影响。

items.title_en: Social media restrictions for under-16s even if no ban, minister says
items.title_zh: 部长表示，即使没有禁令，对 16 岁以下青少年的社交媒体也有限制
items.desc_en: The government is consulting on changes as a new social media law goes through its final Parliamentary stages.
items.desc_zh: 随着新的社交媒体法进入议会最后阶段，政府正在就修改进行咨询。

items.title_en: Musk v Altman: Why the tech billionaires and former friends are now facing off in court
items.title_zh: 马斯克诉奥特曼：为什么科技亿万富翁和前朋友现在在法庭上对峙
items.desc_en: The battle between the AI big hitters has largely played out on social media. Now it is coming to the courtroom.
items.desc_zh: 人工智能巨头之间的战斗主要在社交媒体上展开。现在它来到了法庭。
